topic: ADHD brain vs neurotypical — the dopamine difference
caption: Did you know that ADHD brains have a unique dopamine system? 🧠💡 1 in 10 adults have ADHD, but what's happening in their brains? 🤔 Research shows that dopamine levels are 40% lower in ADHD individuals. 📊 This affects focus, motivation, and emotional regulation. 🌟 Save this to understand the science behind ADHD. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future self will thank you! 💕 #ADHD #Neurodiversity #Dopamine #MentalHealthMatters #BrainScience #FocusTips #ADHDawareness
